case_title: CACH, LLC VS. MAGGIE WONG et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MAGGIE WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 18, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 18, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, MAGGIE AKA MAGGIE HO WONG $6,530.54 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $315.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,845.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MAGGIE WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PARAGRAPH 8 OF THE COMPLAINT DEMONSTRATES THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT ALLEGING ANY BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MAGGIE WONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Paragraph 8 of the complaint demonstrates that plaintiff is not alleging any breach of contract causes of action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Continued To Jul-18-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT MAGGIE WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 18, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 18, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
